phase-plan.purpose: Render XML planning docs in the docs-site so the UI uses XML as the primary source.
phase-plan.scope: Docs-site only; no engine changes. Define minimal XML rendering pipeline and map to existing planning UI.

task.description: Add XML reader/parser for planning docs in docs-site.
Update planning docs routes to render XML instead of Markdown.

decision.summary: XML is the primary planning format; legacy markdown is migrated into XML.
decision.impact: Docs-site should render XML for planning pages.
